examples: The car cut to the left at the intersection
The motorbike veered to the right
The road winds around the lake
the path twisted through the forest

meanings.definition: form a curl, curve, or kink
examples: the cigar smoke curled up at the ceiling

meanings.definition: having or marked by a curve or smoothly rounded bend
examples: the curved tusks of a walrus
his curved lips suggested a smile but his eyes were hard
